tuning: E A D G B E
content:
Macy Gray - I Try

[Intro]
| [ch]E[/ch] [ch]Fdim[/ch] | [ch]Fdim[/ch] [ch]Csus4[/ch] | [ch]D[/ch] -

[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                   [ch]A[/ch]
Games changes and fears[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]Em[/ch]
When will they go from here? When will they stop?[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]D[/ch]                   [ch]A[/ch]
I believe that fate has brought us here[/tab]
[tab]                   [ch]Em7[/ch]
And we should be together babe, but we're not[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                       [ch]F#m7[/ch]
I play it off but I'm dreaming of you[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em7[/ch]                             [ch]A[/ch]
And I'll keep my cool but I'm feigning[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab]                [ch]D[/ch]
I try to say goodbye and I choke[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]Asus[/ch]
I try to walk away and I stumble[/tab]
[tab]                 [ch]Em7[/ch]
Though I try to hide it, it's clear[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]G[/ch]                       [ch]A[/ch]
My world crumbles when you are not near[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]D[/ch]
Goodbye and I choke[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]Asus[/ch]
Try to walk away and I stumble[/tab]
[tab]                 [ch]Em7[/ch]
Though I try to hide it, it's clear[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]G[/ch]
My world crumbles when you are not near[/tab]

[Verse 2]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                   [ch]A[/ch]
I may appear to be free[/tab]
[tab]                  [ch]Em[/ch]
But I'm just a prisoner of your love[/tab]
[tab]                  [ch]D[/ch]                         [ch]A[/ch]
And I may seem alright and smile when you leave[/tab]
[tab]                   [ch]Em7[/ch]
But my smiles are just a front, just a front[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                      [ch]F#m7[/ch]
I play it off but I'm dreaming of you[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em7[/ch]                             [ch]A[/ch]
And I'll keep my cool but I'm feigning[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab]                [ch]D[/ch]
I try to say goodbye and I choke[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]Asus[/ch]
I try to walk away and I stumble[/tab]
[tab]                 [ch]Em7[/ch]
Though I try to hide it, it's clear[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]G[/ch]                       [ch]A[/ch]
My world crumbles when you are not near[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]D[/ch]
Goodbye and I choke [/tab]
[tab]            [ch]Asus[/ch]
Try to walk away and I stumble[/tab]
[tab]                 [ch]Em7[/ch]
Though I try to hide it, it's clear[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]G[/ch]
My world crumbles when you are not near[/tab]

[Bridge]
[tab][ch]Fmaj7[/ch]           [ch]Am7[/ch]                      [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]
Here is my confession, May I be your possession[/tab]
[tab]                 [ch]Em7[/ch]                         [ch]C7[/ch]
Boy I need your touch, your love kisses and such[/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]Bm7[/ch]                   [ch]Em[/ch]
With all my might I try but this I can't deny, deny[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                       [ch]F#m7[/ch]
I play it off but I'm dreaming of you[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                              [ch]A[/ch]
And I'll keep my cool but I'm feigning[/tab]

(Key change)

[Outro]
[tab]   [ch]Bb[/ch]          [ch]Eb[/ch]
I try to say goodbye and I choke[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]Bbsus[/ch]
Try to walk away and I stumble[/tab]
[tab]                 [ch]Fm7[/ch]
Though I try to hide it, it's clear[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]Ab[/ch]                  [ch]Bb[/ch]

[tab]                 [ch]Fm7[/ch]
Though I try to hide it, it's clear[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]Ab[/ch]                  [ch]Bb[/ch]
My world crumbles when you are not near[/tab]

Yeah yeah yeah...[/tab]
